description: Function does too many things or is hard to scan.
Function requires many inputs, making calls confusing.
fix: Group related parameters into objects or simplify API.

description: Boolean parameter changes function behavior paths.
Multiple nested if/for/try blocks reduce readability.
fix: Use guard clauses, early returns, or extraction.

description: Function changes external state unexpectedly.
fix: Make side effects explicit or isolate them.

description: Names like data, item, temp, foo hide intent.
Name suggests behavior different from implementation.
Same logic appears in multiple places.
Unused code remains in the codebase.
fix: Delete it; rely on version control.

description: Class has too many responsibilities.
One object controls too much of the system.
Function uses another object’s data more than its own.
fix: Move behavior closer to the data it uses.

description: Raw numbers appear without explanation.
Condition is hard to understand or repeated.
Small change requires edits across many files.
Errors are caught but ignored.
Broad catch hides specific failure causes.
Global mutable data causes unpredictable behavior.
Domain concepts represented only as strings/numbers.
Code tightly coupled to IO, time, network, or globals.
fix: Inject dependencies and isolate pure logic.

description: Same expensive calculation/query runs repeatedly.
fix: Cache, memoize, batch, or move outside loop.

description: Code performs one query per item.
fix: Use joins, eager loading, or batch queries.

description: API keys/passwords are committed in code.
User input is trusted directly.
Modules depend heavily on concrete implementations.
fix: Use interfaces, dependency injection, clear boundaries.

description: Modules import each other directly or indirectly.
fix: Extract shared dependency or invert dependency direction.

description: Comment repeats what code already says.
fix: Remove or replace with explanation of why.

description: Comment no longer matches behavior.
Function returns different shapes/types depending on path.
Async code blocks event loop or waits serially unnecessarily.
fix: Use non-blocking APIs and parallelize safely.
